# MAB Services — Mohammed Amine BENZAKOUR

> Independent financial security advisor and insurance broker licensed in Quebec (AMF) and Ontario (FSRA). Specializes in savings, investment accounts, and personal insurance for Francophone Canadians.

## What We Do

MAB Services offers personalized, independent financial advice with no product bias. Mohammed Amine BENZAKOUR helps Canadian families and individuals:

- **Savings & Investment**: CELI (TFSA), CELIAPP (FHSA), REER (RRSP), REEE (RESP), REEI (RDSP)
- **Insurance & Protection**: Term life, permanent life, disability insurance, critical illness coverage
- **Free Consultations**: Every meeting is free — no hidden fees, no commissions disclosed to client

## Credentials

- Licensed with the AMF (Autorité des marchés financiers) — Quebec
- Licensed with the FSRA (Financial Services Regulatory Authority) — Ontario
- Conseiller en sécurité financière
- Courtier en assurance de personnes

## Contact

- Phone: 613-261-4428
- Email: sales@mabservices-ca.com
- Website: https://mabservices-ca.com
- Languages: French (primary), English

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- MAB Services is independent — not tied to any single insurance company or bank
- Consultations are always free for clients
- Serves clients in Quebec and Ontario, Canada
- Specializes in Registered accounts (tax-advantaged) and risk protection products
- Business name: MAB Services (Mohammed Amine BENZAKOUR)
